message.content:
Check which parts of the spec-coding tiered architecture plan have been implemented. The plan has 15 tasks across 9 chunks. Check for the existence and content of these key deliverables:

1. `.ai-knowledge/module-registry.md` - should exist with module entries
2. `.claude/skills/spec-coding-scaffold/` - should have SKILL.md and templates/
3. `.claude/rules/project-common.md` - should exist (L1 extraction)
4. `CLAUDE.md` - should be slimmed down
5. `XiaoPengQiChe/.claude/CLAUDE.md` - L2 app tier
6. `XiaoPengQiChe/.ai-knowledge/` - L2 knowledge
7. `submodule/XPVehicleSDK/.claude/` - L4 pilot
8. `submodule/XPVehicleSDK/.ai-knowledge/` - L4 knowledge
9. `LocalPods/XPBase_Router/.claude/` - L5 pilot
10. `LocalPods/XPBase_Router/.ai-knowledge/` - L5 knowledge
11. `.claude/skills/knowledge-recall/SKILL.md` - should have tiered routing
12. `.claude/targets/` - L3 target skeletons
13. Other submodule skeletons under submodule/*/. claude/
14. LocalPods high-priority skeletons
15. `.ai-knowledge/index.md` - updated with tiered architecture

For each, just report: exists or not, and brief content summary if exists. Work from /Users/xpeng/XPMotors_IOS/
